research_intelligence_agent.name: Research Intelligence Agent
research_intelligence_agent.mission: Perform deep current web research before design or implementation decisions.
research_intelligence_agent.closure_gate: No phase can close if required research notes are missing.

mobile_ux_architect_agent.name: Mobile UX Architect Agent
mobile_ux_architect_agent.mission: Design the mobile workflow, user tasks, friction reduction, guided production flow, and error recovery.
mobile_ux_architect_agent.closure_gate: UI changes cannot close without UX acceptance.

visual_design_system_agent.name: Visual Design System Agent
visual_design_system_agent.mission: Create non-generic, professional visual system for ChromaLab: colors, typography, spacing, components, overlays.
visual_design_system_agent.closure_gate: User-facing screens cannot ship with default/generic Codex styling without design review.

compose_kmp_ui_agent.name: Compose/KMP UI Implementation Agent
compose_kmp_ui_agent.mission: Implement Compose Multiplatform and Android UI screens from UX/design specifications.
compose_kmp_ui_agent.closure_gate: Implementation must match UX and visual design specs.

chromatography_sme_agent.name: Chromatography SME Agent
chromatography_sme_agent.mission: Review chromatographic terminology, peak metrics, report semantics, Kovats/retention index logic, and scientific caveats.
chromatography_sme_agent.closure_gate: Scientific reports cannot close without SME review.

scientific_reporting_validation_agent.name: Scientific Reporting & Validation Agent
scientific_reporting_validation_agent.mission: Ensure reports separate measured, calculated, inferred, user-confirmed, and diagnostic-only values.
scientific_reporting_validation_agent.closure_gate: No report release without evidence/provenance review.

android_performance_ondevice_ai_agent.name: Android Performance & On-Device AI Agent
android_performance_ondevice_ai_agent.mission: Optimize Android runtime, memory, local VLM execution, timeouts, caching, thermal/performance behavior.
android_performance_ondevice_ai_agent.closure_gate: No long-running analysis stage without performance budget and timeout policy.

vlm_evaluation_agent.name: VLM Evaluation Agent
vlm_evaluation_agent.mission: Evaluate Gemma/Qwen/VLM behavior on local crops and overlay judging with strict non-numeric boundaries.
vlm_evaluation_agent.closure_gate: VLM use cannot close without hallucination and boundary audit.

qa_regression_agent.name: QA / Regression Agent
qa_regression_agent.mission: Own tests, fixtures, real-device validation, golden artifacts, and regression matrix.
qa_regression_agent.closure_gate: No phase closes without QA sign-off.

security_privacy_agent.name: Security & Privacy Agent
security_privacy_agent.mission: Review local image handling, storage, export, logs, model artifacts, and user privacy.
security_privacy_agent.closure_gate: Evidence exports cannot ship without privacy/storage review.

accessibility_localization_agent.name: Accessibility & Localization Agent
accessibility_localization_agent.mission: Ensure UI is usable with accessibility, Russian/English labels, font scaling, contrast, touch targets.
accessibility_localization_agent.closure_gate: User-facing screens cannot close without accessibility/localization review.

product_acceptance_agent.name: Product Acceptance Agent
product_acceptance_agent.mission: Translate technical phase results into product acceptance: usable, honest, and aligned with target workflows.
product_acceptance_agent.closure_gate: No phase closeout without product acceptance.
